# Description

Cancelled by the 2026-04 pre-ACP archive pass. The local-openai provider line was superseded and archived.


# [PKT-PRV-003](task-0070): Provider Selection

## Purpose

Implement deterministic provider selection.

## Scope

- Selection logic
- Rules
- Fallback

## Implementation

1. Implement selection
2. Define rules
3. Add fallback

## Acceptance Criteria

Cancelled with superseded provider line.
